calendar.matters:
FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Nov-09-2016 Off Calendar

Petition For Approval Of Payment From Snt For Real Property Renovation Expenses, Off-Site Housing Expenses During Renovations And Change In Venue
Off Calendar Aug-30-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Sep-04-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Gemma O'Keeffe for (proposed guardian ad litem) Patricia Ryan. Rebecca Byrne, litigation attorney for the guardian ad litem.

The Court stated that there were a couple of issues, that the Special Needs Trust (SNT) seems appropriate, that it does not think that it is appropriate to grant blanket authority regarding the mutual funds and that the fees should either be submitted as a base fee or hourly and that there should be no extraordinary fees. Ms. O'Keeffe reported that Fremont Bank has withdrawn its request and sent her a revised schedule. The Court stated that she will need to amend the petition. Ms. O'Keeffe asked if the fee request could be denied. The Court stated that it could not deny it and then approve something else. Ms. Ryan stated that they need the order approving the SNT to get the annuity payments into it. The Court stated that it could grant the relief but deny the mutual fund investment and the extraordinary fees. Ms. Ryan stated that they have the schedule of compensation from the bank, that they will file the amended petition and that they are desperate to have the trust approved. Ms. O'Keeffe read from an email received from Fremont Bank regarding the fees, stated that they need the order to fund the SNT and that they can file another petition regarding the fees and mutual funds. The Court granted the petition re substituted judgment trust (subject to review of the order) except the authority to invest in mutual funds and the extraordinary fees.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
